name: Symbol Index Extractor
short_description: Palace-Serena-backed, LSP-driven symbol graph that serves as the backbone queried by every other extractor. Uses SourceKit-LSP + indexstore-db for Swift and the official JetBrains Kotlin LSP (kotlin-lsp) for Kotlin, producing a unified :Symbol node set with resolved type information, module membership, and cross-module reference edges.
tech_stack: SourceKit-LSP (swiftlang/sourcekit-lsp) — semantic indexing via indexstore-db; workspace/symbol, textDocument/definition, textDocument/references, callHierarchy
indexstore-db (swiftlang/indexstore-db) — composable query API; UncheckedIndex/CheckedIndex; libIndexStore backend
Kotlin LSP (Kotlin/kotlin-lsp, JetBrains, KotlinConf 2025) — IntelliJ/Fleet engine exposed as LSP; JVM-only Gradle in current scope
fwcd/kotlin-language-server (community fallback) — MIT, active 2025; uses kotlin-compiler directly; less accurate but more portable
palace-serena MCP server — wraps SourceKit-LSP and kotlin-lsp behind unified symbol query interface
scip-java (sourcegraph/scip-java) — secondary path for Kotlin: compiles with SemanticDB plugin then runs scip-java index-semanticdb
tree-sitter — fallback for files not covered by LSP
entity_model: Node types: :Symbol (fqn, name, kind=[class|struct|enum|protocol|func|var|typealias|associatedtype|actor|extension], module, path, line, col, visibility, language, is_generated). :Module (name, language, path, type=[SwiftPM|Gradle|KMP-shared|KMP-ios|KMP-android]). :SymbolOccurrence (symbol_fqn, file_path, line, col, role=[definition|reference|call|override|conformance]). :TypeRelation. Edge types: :DEFINED_IN. :REFERENCED_IN (count=int). :TYPE_INHERITS. :TYPE_CONFORMS. :OVERRIDES. :IMPORTS. Faceted axes: structural=module-membership, semantic-kind=[declaration|reference|conformance], domain-concept=[type-hierarchy|import-graph], capability=[Resolves|Indexes|CrossModule].

prior_art.name: SourceKit-LSP + indexstore-db (swiftlang)
prior_art.notes: Apple's official LSP. Apache-2.0. Tied to Swift 6.1 toolchain (2025).

prior_art.name: indexstore-db (swiftlang)
prior_art.notes: Composable query library over .indexstore. Apache-2.0. Active.

prior_art.name: Kotlin LSP (JetBrains official)
prior_art.notes: Previewed KotlinConf 2025. IntelliJ/Fleet engine. Alpha roadmap later 2025. JVM-only Gradle currently. Partially closed-source.

prior_art.name: kotlin-language-server (fwcd, community)
prior_art.notes: MIT. Active 2025. Uses kotlin-compiler directly. Portable but less accurate.

prior_art.name: Glean (Meta OSS, Dec 2024)
prior_art.notes: Design reference for cross-language unified symbol graph at scale.

prior_art.name: palace-serena MCP server
prior_art.notes: Gimle-Palace's serena integration. Already in production.

consumer_query_patterns.label: Resolve all public symbols in a module
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (s:Symbol {module: $module_name, visibility: 'public'})-[:DEFINED_IN]->(m:Module) RETURN s.fqn, s.kind, s.path, s.line ORDER BY s.kind, s.name

consumer_query_patterns.label: Find all callers of a specific function across modules
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (occ:SymbolOccurrence {symbol_fqn: $fqn, role: 'call'})<-[:REFERENCED_IN]-(f:Symbol) RETURN f.fqn, f.module, f.path ORDER BY f.module

consumer_query_patterns.label: Module import dependency graph (two hops)
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (m:Module {name: $module_name})-[:IMPORTS*1..2]->(dep:Module) RETURN dep.name, dep.type ORDER BY dep.name

consumer_query_patterns.label: All types that conform to a given protocol/interface
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (s:Symbol)-[:TYPE_CONFORMS]->(proto:Symbol {name: $protocol_name}) RETURN s.fqn, s.kind, s.module ORDER BY s.module

graphiti_episode_type: EntityNode for :Symbol and :Module. EpisodicNode for :SymbolOccurrence. :TYPE_CONFORMS and :TYPE_INHERITS edges permanent while conformance declaration exists.
ingest_perf_est: [uncertain] Full ingest on 20-Kit repo: Swift indexing ~5-15 min clean build; Kotlin LSP ~10-25 min. Total ~20-40 min. Incremental: sub-second for SourceKit-LSP; ~10-60 seconds per changed file.
failure_modes: SourceKit-LSP stale index if build system not invoked after changes
Kotlin LSP (JetBrains) partially closed-source and JVM-only in 2025 GA; KMP shared modules may fall back to community server or scip-java
Generated code noise: protobuf, SwiftGen outputs inflate symbol count; is_generated flag via path heuristic
Swift 6 actor isolation — SourceKit-LSP support incomplete as of Swift 6.0
Cross-module type resolution requires dependent module indexed first
RAM: Kotlin LSP daemon 4-8 GB; SourceKit-LSP 2-4 GB; parallel 12+ GB
open_questions: Merge vs separate with Item 41 (SCIP/LSIF): Item 21 live LSP vs Item 41 batch SCIP. Keep separate with join-by-display_name+module, merge, or deprecate LSP for Kotlin?
Should :SymbolOccurrence nodes be stored in Graphiti? 20-Kit repo may generate 5-10M occurrences. Sidecar index (Tantivy/Lucene) alternative.
Kotlin LSP JetBrains vs community (fwcd): accuracy vs openness tradeoff
How to unify FQN format between Swift and Kotlin for cross-language dedup?
KMP expect/actual: does Item 21 or Item 4 own :EXPECT_ACTUAL edge?
adversarial_resistance: high — LSP-based indexing is deterministic, compiler-driven. Macro expansion handled pre-indexing. Generated code flagged.
